title: rosa coriifolia var. cenisia
intro: Rosa coriifolia var. cenisia, also known as the Alpenrose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The Alpenrose is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infection. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
